name: White Chocolate Mousse - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the sugar and water until the mixture forms a soft ball.
2. Beat egg whites in a bowl to medium stiff peaks using a whisk on medium speed, then high speed briefly.
3. Gradually fold the sugar and water (soft ball stage) from the saucepan into the beaten egg whites, mixing just until a stiff meringue forms.
4. In a metal bowl, beat egg yolks with a whisk over heat until thickened.
5. Add rum to the yolk mixture while continuing to beat on heat.
6. Gently fold the rum-soaked egg yolks into the egg white mixture.
7. Carefully fold in the melted chocolate until fully incorporated.
8. Refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours before serving.
